title: Life
content:
This world that we're a-livin' in
        Is mighty hard to beat,
     For you get a thorn with every rose -
        But ain't the roses sweet!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Life", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
